temporal_description: A close-up, over-the-shoulder shot shows a man in a dark suit and tie in a dimly lit, institutional-looking room. The background is out of focus, but a bulletin board with papers pinned to it is visible on the left. In the top left corner of the screen, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The camera remains steady, focusing on the man's profile as he looks off-screen with a serious expression. The audio begins with a sharp, percussive sound, like a hand slapping a hard surface. A man then speaks in a firm, commanding voice, his tone serious and authoritative. He issues a direct order, "全都跟我来" (Everyone, follow me). The man turns his head slightly and then turns his body away from the camera, walking towards the right side of the frame. The camera follows his movement, maintaining the close-up perspective. The background remains a blur of the room's interior. The white Chinese text is still visible in the corner. The man continues to walk away from the camera, his back now mostly to the viewer. The shot is still a close-up, capturing the back of his head and shoulders as he moves deeper into the dark, indistinct space. The "风行网" text remains on screen. The scene is devoid of any background music, making the command and the initial sound effect the central focus of the audio.
